text: - Hello. - Hello? - Yes. - Good afternoon, this is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Tennessee State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? - You guys have been, they've been calling me all every day about it. - I'm really sorry about that. I'm just here to make sure you're aware of your rights and to help you get these benefits processed. You're on both part A and part B, right? - No, I'm not. - Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day. - All right.
